name: -m
--mini-list
options.description: Displays a compacted list without formatting

name: -l
--log
options.description: Specifies entire log file (error and out are both included)

name: -k
--kill-timeout
options.description: Delays before sending final SIGKILL signal to process

options.name: --max-memory-restart
options.description: Specify max memory amount used to autorestart (in octet or use syntax like 100M)

options.name: --restart-delay
options.description: Specify a delay between restarts (in milliseconds)

options.name: --env
options.description: Specify environment to get specific env variables

options.name: --log-type
options.description: Specify log output style (raw by default, json optional)

name: -x
--execute-command
options.description: Execute a program using fork system

options.name: --max-restarts
options.description: Only Restart the script COUNT times

name: -u
--user
options.description: Defines user when generating startup script

options.name: --hp
options.description: Defines home path when generating startup script

options.name: --wait-ip
options.description: Overrides systemd script to wait for full internet connectivity to launch pm2

options.name: --service-name
options.description: Defines service name when generating startup script

name: -c
--cron
options.description: Restarts a running process based on a cron pattern

options.name: --interpreter
options.description: The interpreter pm2 should use for executing app (bash, python…)

options.name: --log-date-format
options.description: Adds custom prefix timestamp to logs

options.name: --no-daemon
options.description: Runs pm2 daemon in the foreground if it doesn’t exist already

options.name: –-only
options.description: With json declaration, allow to only act on one application

options.name: –-wait-ready
options.description: Asks pm2 to wait for ready event from your app

options.name: –-merge-logs
options.description: Merges logs from different instances but keep error and out separated

options.name: –-node-args
options.description: Space delimited arguments to pass to node in cluster mode

options.name: –-no-vizion
options.description: Starts an app without vizion feature (versioning control)

options.name: –-no-autorestart
options.description: Starts an app without automatic restart

options.name: –-no-treekill
options.description: Only kills the main process, not detached children

options.name: –-sort
options.description: Sort process according to field’s name

args.name: file, json, stdin, app name, pm id, etc

subcommands.name: startOrReload
subcommands.description: Start or gracefully reload JSON file

subcommands.name: pid
subcommands.description: Return pid of the specified app or all

subcommands.name: startOrGracefulReload
subcommands.description: Start or gracefully reolad JSON file

subcommands.name: scale
subcommands.description: Scale up/down a process in cluster mode depending on the `number` param

subcommands.name: gracefulReload
subcommands.description: Gracefully reload a process. Send a “shutdown” message to close all connections

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Stops and deletes a process from pm2 process list

args.name: name, id, script, all, json, stdin, etc

subcommands.name: sendSignal
subcommands.description: Send a system signal to the target process

subcommands.name: ping
subcommands.description: Ping pm2 daemon - if not it will launch up

subcommands.name: updatePM2
subcommands.description: Update in-memory PM2 with local PM2

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: (alias) update in-memory PM2 with local PM2

name: install
module:install
subcommands.description: Install or update a module and run it forever

subcommands.name: pull
subcommands.description: Updates repository for a given app

subcommands.name: forward
subcommands.description: Updates repository to the next commit for a given app

subcommands.name: backward
subcommands.description: Downgrades repository to the previous commit for a given app

subcommands.name: gc
subcommands.description: Force PM2 to trigger garbage collection

subcommands.name: deepUpdate
subcommands.description: Performs a deep update of PM2

expose
subcommands.description: Serves a directory over http via port
